context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the document-engine instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: All generated documentation (README, guides, examples) must be in **English** unless the user explicitly requests another language.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Check each row in the Documentation Gaps checklist against the draft. A checklist item **passes** when the docs contain a corresponding section with at least one copyable code example or explicit prose statement. A checklist item **fails** when the section is absent, incomplete, or lacks a concrete example. For each failing item: add the missing section or example, then re-run the checklist from the top. Do not finalize until all critical items pass.
